response.original_title: How Do I Contact Robinhood Customer Support? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Robinhood customer support is mainly handled through the app and official Help Center (: 1-863-338-2360) They do not rely on a public direct support phone number for most users (: 1-863-338-2360) Instead, you request help through secure in-app or online channels (: 1-863-338-2360)  1. Contact Through the Robinhood App (: 1-863-338-2360) Open the Robinhood app and log in (: 1-863-338-2360) Tap the Account / Menu icon (: 1-863-338-2360) Go to Help or Support (: 1-863-338-2360) Select your issue from the list (: 1-863-338-2360) Tap Contact Support or Request a Callback (: 1-863-338-2360) A support representative may call or message you back (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: How Do I Contact Robinhood Customer Support? (: 1-863-338-2360)
